content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
428 J Street • Suite 620 • Sacramento, CA 95814-2329
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886

September 23, 2005

Shirley L. Grindle
5021 E. Glen Arran
Orange, CA 92869

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-05-196

Dear Ms. Grindle:

This letter is to confirm that, pursuant to our telephone conversation on
September 22, 2005, you have withdrawn your request for advice regarding the campaign
disclosure provisions of the Political Reform Act (Gov. Code sections 81000 – 91014).

If you have any other questions regarding this matter, please contact me at (916)
322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: Carla Wardlow
Division Chief
Technical Assistance Division

CW:rd
I:\AdviceLtrs\05-196
